plan: Trim SPY to 20% to reduce concentration and meet the single-name mandate.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to eliminate leveraged ETF exposure, aligning with capital preservation.
Increase QQQI to 25% for greater income and broad market exposure.
Trim CRWD to 10% to reduce single-name concentration.
Buy XLV at 10% to diversify into a new, defensive sector.
This plan aims for capital preservation and reduced overall risk.
conservative.read: This conservative plan targets a modest ~1.5%/month, prioritizing capital preservation. It significantly reduces leverage and concentration, aiming for lower drawdown. Expect limited upside potential in strong bull markets.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to meet the concentration mandate.
Sell SOXL and SPAL to reduce leveraged ETF exposure to zero.
Trim QQQI to 10% to reallocate capital towards growth opportunities.
Increase CRWD to 15% to lean into a quality tech name with an uptrend.
Buy RTX at 10% to diversify with a high-scoring scanner setup.
This plan balances risk and growth, maintaining a moderate risk profile.
balanced.read: This balanced plan targets ~2.5%/month, focusing on risk-first growth. It reduces overall leverage and concentration while adding high-quality setups. Expect moderate drawdowns and growth potential.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to meet the concentration mandate.
Sell SOXL and SPAL to exit downtrending and below-stop leveraged ETFs.
Trim QQQI to 5% to reallocate capital towards higher growth potential.
Increase CRWD to 20% to press into a strong uptrending tech name.
Buy RTX at 15% and AMAT at 10% to add high-scoring scanner setups.
This plan aggressively leans into strong setups for stretched growth.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets ~4%/month, aiming for stretched growth. It concentrates in high-scoring setups and uses leverage carefully. Be aware of significantly higher potential drawdown and the daily decay/rebalancing of leveraged ETFs; strict stop discipline is critical.

plan: Trim SPY to 20% to reduce concentration and free capital.
Sell QQQ, CRWD, and SMH to reduce growth and high-beta exposure.
Sell SOXL and SPAL to eliminate all leveraged ETFs.
Add QQQI to 45% to maximize income and broad market exposure.
This plan prioritizes steady monthly distributions and low drawdown.
income.read: This income plan targets ~1%/month, focusing on parking cash for yield. It significantly reduces growth and high-beta exposure, prioritizing income-generating ETFs. While aiming for low drawdown, distributions are variable and NAV can still fall in selloffs.
